  • All Classes
 

Uses of Class
jline.lang.Network

  • Packages that use Network 
    Package Description
    jline.api
    This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models
    jline.examples
    This package contains several example models
    jline.lang
    Classes to declare basic elements of a model
    jline.lang.layered
    This package contains the classes used the specify LayeredNetwork objects
    jline.lang.nodes
    This package contains the classes used the specify Network objects
    jline.lang.state
    Classes that model the state of a network and its individual nodes
    jline.solvers
    This package contains the solver superclasses and related data structures
    jline.solvers.fluid
    Classes that implement solution approaches based on mean-field and fluid approximations
    jline.solvers.fluid.smoothing
    Classes that implement the smoothing method for transient fluid analysis
    jline.solvers.jmt
    Classes that rely on the Java Modelling Tools (JMT) suite solvers
    jline.solvers.ln
    Classes that define LINE's Layered Network (LN) solver
    jline.solvers.mam
    Classes that analyze networks using matrix-analytic methods
    jline.solvers.mva
    Classes that analyze networks through Mean-Value Analysis (MVA)
    jline.solvers.nc
    Classes that analyze networks using Normalizing Costant (NC) methods
    jline.solvers.ssa
    Classes that analyze networks using Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (SSA)

    • Uses of Network in jline.api

      Fields in jline.api declared as Network 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      Network FJ.FJApproxReturn.nonfjmodel  
      Methods in jline.api with parameters of type Network 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Matrix FJ.findPaths​(NetworkStruct sn, Matrix P, int startNode, int endNode, int r, ArrayList<Integer> toMerge, Matrix QN, Matrix TN, double currentTime, Matrix fjclassmap, Matrix fjforkmap, Network nonfjmodel)
      Finds the response times along each path leading out of startNode up to (and not including) endNode
      static FJ.FJApproxReturn FJ.ht​(Network model)
      Heidelberger-Trivedi fork-join queueing network transformation.
      static FJ.FJApproxReturn FJ.mmt​(Network model, Matrix forkLambda)
      Fork-Join Transform approach to evaluate queueing networks including fork-join systems.
      static FJ.FJsortForksReturn FJ.sortForks​(NetworkStruct sn, NetworkStruct nonfjstruct, Matrix fjforkmap, Matrix fjclassmap, Network nonfjmodel)
      Determines a directed acyclic graph of relationships among fork nodes.
      Constructors in jline.api with parameters of type Network 
      Constructor Description
      FJApproxReturn​(Network nonfjmodel, Matrix fjclassmap, Matrix fjforkmap, Map<Integer,​Integer> fj_auxiliary_delays, Map<Integer,​Integer> fanout)
